meta.title: Emended description of Pasteuria nishizawae
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The description of the Gram-positive, obligately parasitic, mycelial and endospore-forming bacterium, Pasteuria nishizawae, is emended to include additional observations on the life cycle, host specificity and endospore morphology. The nucleotide sequence of the 16S rRNA gene is also provided.
